entryType: direct entry into living area with central circulation spine
kitchenLocation: northeast corner with adjacent dining area and pantry, connected to living space
bedroomLayout: split bedroom layout with master bedroom separated on west side, two secondary bedrooms clustered on south side
bathroomPlacement: back-to-back bathrooms sharing central plumbing wall - ensuite master bath and shared hall bathroom
efficiencyNotes: back-to-back bathrooms share plumbing to reduce costs
laundry room centrally located for efficiency
uniqueFeatures: angled walls create visual interest and space definition
separate dining area despite compact footprint
dedicated laundry room rather than closet
dimensionNotes: compact but well-proportioned rooms with living area taking largest allocation, bedrooms appropriately sized for ADU scale, efficient use of 44'-8" x 26'-8" footprint
